content.text: Let me verify the project still compiles:

result.output: .next/dev/types/validator.ts(78,39): error TS2307: Cannot find module '../../../app/test/accordion/page.js' or its corresponding type declarations.

content.text:
The only error is a pre-existing one unrelated to our changes. All tooltip additions compile cleanly.

Here's a summary of everything I changed:

### Changes made

| File | What changed |
|------|-------------|
| **`components/social-link.tsx`** | **New file** — client component that wraps each social icon link in a `Tooltip` showing the platform name (GitHub, X (Twitter), Email) |
| **`app/page.tsx`** | Imported new `SocialLink` component, removed the old local helper function, updated Twitter label to "X (Twitter)" |
| **`components/ui/theme-switch-button.tsx`** | Wrapped the theme toggle `<button>` in `<Tooltip content="Toggle theme" side="bottom">` |
| **`components/search-hint.tsx`** | Wrapped the mobile-only search icon button in `<Tooltip content="Search" side="bottom">` |
| **`components/share-buttons.tsx`** | Replaced native `title` attributes on the three share buttons with `<Tooltip content="...">` wrappers ("Share on Twitter", "Share on LinkedIn", "Copy link to clipboard") |

### What got tooltips (and why)

- **Theme toggle** — icon-only button, no visible label → "Toggle theme"
- **Search (mobile)** — icon-only button, no visible label → "Search"
- **GitHub / X / Email social links** — icon-only links, no visible label → platform name
- **Share buttons (Twitter, LinkedIn, Copy link)** — icon-only buttons, previously used native `title` → now use the styled `Tooltip` component

### What didn't get tooltips (and why not)

- **BackButton** — already has visible text labels ("All posts", "Back to home", "Back")
- **CommandMenu** — all items have text labels and descriptions
- **ReadingProgress** — purely visual bar
- **RelatedPosts, BlogIndexClient** — all text-content, no icon-only elements
- **GithubInfo** — server component with text; star count has visible text
- **Desktop search hint** — already shows `⌘K` label
The issue is that React component types (functions) can't be passed as props from Server Components to Client Components. Let me fix `SocialLink` to use `children` instead:

content.text:
All fixed. The problem was that React component types (functions like `IconBrandGithub`) can't be serialized as props from Server Components to Client Components. The fix:

- **`SocialLink`** now accepts `children` (rendered JSX) instead of an `icon` prop (component type)
- **`app/page.tsx`** passes the icon JSX elements as children between the tags instead of as `icon={}` prop

This is the standard pattern — the server renders the icon elements into serializable React nodes, and the client component just renders them via `{children}`. No more `Functions cannot be passed directly to Client Components` errors.
theme toggle tooptip should be dynamic

edits.newText: <Tooltip content={theme === 'light' ? 'Switch to dark mode' : 'Switch to light mode'} side="bottom">

result.output: Successfully replaced 1 block(s) in /home/himmel/personal/www/components/ui/theme-switch-button.tsx.

content.text:
Now the tooltip dynamically changes based on the current theme state:

- **Light mode** → shows "Switch to dark mode"
- **Dark mode** → shows "Switch to light mode"

It reacts instantly since `theme` is tracked in React state, so the tooltip content updates on the very next render after toggling.
